overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt ascending a snowy mountain slope during a dramatic purple-hued dusk. The character walks steadily toward large rock formations while surrounded by snow-covered terrain and scattered boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain slope with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily up the snowy incline toward the large rock formation ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain terrain forming the ground surface
prominent boulder outcrop directly ahead on the slope
tall snow-capped mountain peak visible to the left
loose rocks and boulders scattered across the left side of the slope
dramatic purple and pink clouds filling the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a desolate snow-covered mountain slope under a dramatic purple dusk sky. The terrain features scattered boulders and a large rock formation ahead, with a distant mountain peak visible to the left. The environment is completely empty as the character steadily climbs the incline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt ascends a desolate, snow-covered mountain slope under a dramatic purple dusk sky. It begins with the character steadily climbing a steep incline, surrounded by a vast and empty frozen wilderness. As he moves forward, the camera tracks his progress past scattered boulders that dot the white terrain. The scene then opens up to reveal a large rock formation directly ahead, while a distant mountain peak remains visible to the left against the deepening twilight.
